name: Dr. Arjun Mehta
title: Chief Ayurveda Physician
bio: BAMS, MD (Ayurveda) — Specializes in metabolic disorders, men's health, and adaptogens-based therapy. Leads NirogNature's clinical advisory board.

name: Dr. Meera Sharma
title: Nutrition Scientist
bio: MSc Clinical Nutrition, PhD — Expert in evidence-based supplementation, micronutrient therapy, and functional foods. Oversees NirogNature formulation R&D.

name: Dr. Sanjay Verma
title: Dermatologist
bio: MBBS, MD (Dermatology) — Focuses on nutraceutical approaches to skin health, anti-aging, and hair restoration. Advises on NirogNature's skin and hair care line.

name: Dt. Kavita Nair
title: Dietician & Wellness Coach
bio: MSc Dietetics — Certified wellness coach specializing in holistic lifestyle modifications, sports nutrition, and weight management programs.
